task.title: Redis Integration and Rate Limiting
task.description: Implement Redis connection and rate limiting middleware for tenant isolation

implementation.details:
1. Add redis crate and connection pool
2. Implement rate limiting middleware with token bucket
3. Add deduplication cache with TTL
4. Configure Redis for pub/sub notifications
5. Add Redis health checks

decision.description: Default rate limit values per tenant

task.acceptance_criteria: Redis connections work, rate limiting blocks requests after limit, deduplication prevents duplicate notifications
